message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant Client
participant Server

note over Client, Server
"Authentication"
note over Client, Server
"Request Delete a file"
@endnote

1 REQUEST (AuthenticationRequest) -> Server
Server-->>Client ACCEPT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)
Server-->>Client REJECT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)

note over Client, Server
"Request Delete a file"
